title: satureja montana f. subquadrangula
intro: Satureja montana f. subquadrangula is a subspecies of the mountain savory plant, a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Satureja montana f. subquadrangula include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, and is also used in traditional medicine and culinary practices, particularly in Mediterranean and Middle Eastern cuisine.
